input.headline: The Air Quality Index and how to use it, explained

raw.headline: The Air Quality Index and how to use it, explained

winner: I tried using an Air Quality Index for my romance life, but I kept getting a "meh" rating—turns out love and oxygen are both better when they're *fresh*.

candidates.text: I always thought the best way to check air quality was to see if your dog was sniffing or sneezing—if he's both, you're basically breathing a cloud.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific comparison with a dog's reaction, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: The Air Quality Index is like a weather report for your lungs, except instead of saying "chance of rain," it says "chance of lung cancer." And just like you wouldn't go outside if they said there was a 70% chance of rain, you probably shouldn't either.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison between weather reports and lung health, specific reference to 'chance of lung cancer,' concise and natural delivery."}

candidates.text: Why did I stop checking my Air Quality Index? Because every time I saw "Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups," my goldfish would just stare blankly and say, "I’m fine, I’m a fish.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and uses a surprising twist with the goldfish responding to the AQI. It's humorous and ties directly to the headline topic."}

candidates.text: Why did I get kicked out of AQI school? Turns out, I was *too* good at breathing in fresh air—it made the other kids feel like they were choking on my cleanliness.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and specific, using a play on 'cleanliness' in the context of air quality. It's somewhat surprising and concise, though the humor relies on a slightly niche understanding of AQI."}

candidates.text: I tried using an Air Quality Index for my romance life, but I kept getting a "meh" rating—turns out love and oxygen are both better when they're *fresh*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and surprising, drawing an unexpected parallel between air quality and romance. It's concise and uses natural language, though the humor is somewhat light and may not resonate as strongly with all audiences."}
